title: Baked Aubergine with Irish Sausage
description: A hearty and flavorful dish combining the sweetness of aubergine with the savory taste of Irish sausage.
instructions: Cut the aubergine into 1-inch cubes and place on a baking sheet.
Drizzle with olive oil and sprinkle with garlic powder.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until tender.
Meanwhile, cook the Irish sausage in a pan over medium-high heat until browned.
Add the bitter to the pan and stir to combine.
Serve the sausage and bitter mixture over the roasted aubergine.
Garnish with chopped fresh herbs, if desired.
